name: CONTRACT-BUG-41
title: Post-wave cleanup: _PRODUCER_FIELDS hardcoded (violates Inv 23); CheckResult not @dataclass; _get_repo_root boundary; cleanup pyc + stale test comments
description:
Audit findings after BACKLOG-26/27:

1. CRITICAL spec violation: lib/checks.py check_template_producer_consistency hardcodes _PRODUCER_FIELDS as a static set. Spec Inv 23 explicitly says 'The producer list MUST be derived from the current build-contract.json or another live source, not from hardcoded names.' Either derive from a live source (e.g. parse bug-template.json schema or rabbit-file's bug-writer surface) or amend Inv 23 to acknowledge the static contract.

2. CheckResult is plain class with __slots__, not @dataclass. Spec Inv 44(a) says 'dataclass with exactly two fields'. Convert to @dataclass or loosen spec wording.

3. _get_repo_root is private (underscore prefix) but check-symlinks-resolve.py imports it from lib.checks. Either promote to public get_repo_root or inline in the shim.

4. contract.md provides.lib lists FILES only — should enumerate function/class names as a versioned API surface so cross-feature consumers (rabbit-feature now imports validate_feature directly) can distinguish breaking renames from non-breaking refactors.

5. Stale references to deleted scripts in test-bug-fixes-cycle.py comments (render-template.py, workspace-map.py, check-opus-for-planning-agents.py) — clean up.

6. Remove stale __pycache__ entries under scripts/ and lib/.
